nodes.label: Self-contained verification harness. Safe to ship via SSH to a TPU VM — only sta

nodes.label: Solver → RAG → Assembly → Verify pipeline
nodes.rationale: Core architectural pattern described in the plan: deterministic solver computes tile sizes, RAG retrieves verified templates, assembler injects params, verifier ships to TPU VM

nodes.label: LanceDB RAG template retrieval
nodes.rationale: Planned but not yet wired: LanceDB provides vector similarity retrieval of verified Pallas templates; currently served statically by templates.py

nodes.label: Kuzu knowledge graph for kernel provenance
nodes.norm_label: kuzu knowledge graph for kernel provenance

nodes.label: Remote TPU VM verification
nodes.rationale: verify.py is intentionally self-contained (only jax, numpy, sqlite3) so it can be shipped via SSH to a TPU VM for TPU_COMPILE mode
